description: A Product Marketing Manager needs to segment the product portfolio into 3 distinct tiers based on performance. Import 'sales_data.csv' from 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\' and create a scatter chart using Product_ID for details, the sum of Quantity_Sold for the X-axis, and the sum of Sales_Amount for the Y-axis. Generate exactly 3 clusters using the scatter chart and rename the resulting field to 'Product_Segment'. Create a table visual displaying the 'Product_Segment', the count of Product_ID, and the average Sales_Amount. Save the final report as 'Product_Segmentation.pbix' to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\'.
